{{Infobox group
| name = Heaven's Glory
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Heaven's Glory Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] is a prominent organization located on [[Mount Samara]], the highest of the four holy peaks in [[Sacred Valley]]. The school's location is characterized by a permanent ring of [[light aura]] encircling the summit, which provides constant illumination and allows disciples to harvest [[light aura]] even during moonless nights. The school's architecture is notable for its impressive rainstone buildings, which possess a glistening, water-drenched appearance under the light. These structures include the [[Lesser Treasure Hall]], a large repository for various treasures and artifacts. Disciples of the school wear specific clothing to denote their rank, typically consisting of white and gold garments with red sashes. Members are identified by badges—such as iron, copper, or [[jade]]—worn around their necks or on their chests. The school utilizes various combatants and specialized roles, including guards, enforcers, and practitioners of light-aspect arts. Their combat style often involves the use of golden light, specialized constructs, and [[Striker techniques]]. The school also possesses unique traditions, such as the [[Trial of Glorious Ascension]], a staircase challenge involving [[Remnant]] formations. Additionally, they utilize a specialized technique called Heaven’s Wish, which allows for the near-total transfer of power and skill from one practitioner to an heir.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Ancestor's Tomb]] leads down into a [[labyrinth]] that [[Yerin's master]] found difficult to navigate.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] is sorting through [[Heaven's Glory]] artifacts.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Heaven's Glory]] energy can be drawn from a core.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The Heaven's Lance technique strikes out in a line of light and heat.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] can defend against light using [[Heaven's Glory]] [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] holds a grudge against the [[Sandvipers]] and [[Heaven's Glory]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Heaven's Glory]] is a group that someone could rebel against.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c1">''Uncrowned'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Heaven's Glory]] is a group that [[Adama]] has access to in exchange for sharing treasures.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Heaven’s Glory is a group that [[Adama]] intends to raze.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Heaven's Glory]] is a school.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Initially considered by [[Lindon]] as a group worthy of a chance, Heaven's Glory is a settlement populated by warriors and defenders that features buildings constructed from pale [[orus wood]] or rainstone. Though the group was once seen attacking an exile camp with fire and slicing through boxes, they were eventually driven away by a fire in the sky, after which [[Eithan]] established their leadership. The location serves as a destination for both the [[Akura Golds]] and those fleeing danger, housing hundreds of thousands of people within its passageway as humanity pushes to leave. Members of the group use [[madra]] and techniques capable of blasting through trees, and they can be seen watching fires from within the settlement. Ultimately, Heaven's Glory rebuilt the [[Ancestor's Tomb]] and remains a place that [[Elder Whisper]] can visit unseen.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Heaven's Glory]] is a group [[Lindon]] intends to give a chance.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Heaven's Glory]] is a location where they could stay for the night.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Heaven’s Glory has warriors and defenders.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Heaven’s Glory is a group that is attacking an exile camp with fire and slicing through boxes.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Heaven's Glory]] was driven away by a fire in the sky.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8">''Bloodline'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] established leadership of [[Heaven's Glory]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Heaven’s Glory is a destination for the [[Akura Golds]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Heaven’s Glory is a location that the [[Li clan]] can reach by sunset.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Heaven’s Glory contains buildings made of rainstone or pale [[orus wood]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}</li>
</ul></div>
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Heaven�s Glory members are present and watching the fire.}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Heaven�s Glory uses [[madra]].}}
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Heaven's Glory]] is a destination people are fleeing toward.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Heaven's Glory]] uses techniques that can blast through trees.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Hundreds of thousands of people are inside the [[Heaven's Glory]] passageway.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Humanity was pushing to leave through [[Heaven's Glory]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Crowds push their way out of Heaven’s Glory.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Heaven’s Glory rebuilt the Ancestor’s [[Tomb]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c22">''Bloodline'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elder Whisper]] can visit Heaven’s Glory unseen.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c22" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|"I plan to give Heaven’s Glory a chance," Lindon warned her.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Only get that view if we stay at Heaven’s Glory for the night,” Yerin pointed out.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|"I know you know about the fire in the sky that drove away Heaven’s Glory."<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
